channel.title: oddfruit News
channel.description: Development updates, release notes and INR Mate news from oddfruit.

item.title: INR Mate v1.2 adds Siri and Shortcuts support
item.description: INR Mate v1.2 adds Siri and Shortcuts support for quicker INR and warfarin logging.

item.title: INR Mate v1.1 adds Comfort Mode, clinic visit PDFs and smoother sync
item.description: INR Mate v1.1 adds Comfort Mode, clinic visit PDFs and smoother sync across devices.

item.title: INR Mate launches on the App Store
item.description: INR Mate launches on the App Store as a private INR and warfarin tracker for Apple devices.
